command_failures.command:
/bin/zsh -lc 'set -euo pipefail
session_json=$(curl -s -X POST http://localhost:8565/api/v1/sessions -H '"'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{\"working_title\":\"Beat QA Session\"}')
session_id="'$(printf '"'%s' \""'$session_json" | jq -r '"'.id // .snapshot.id // empty')
echo \"session_id="'$session_id"
curl -s -X POST http://localhost:8565/api/v1/sessions/$session_id/selections/genre -H '"'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{\"genre_slug\":\"quest-fantasy\",\"origin\":\"workspace\"}' >/dev/null
curl -s -X POST http://localhost:8565/api/v1/sessions/"'$session_id/selections/tone -H '"'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{\"tone_profile_slug\":\"hushed-wonder\",\"origin\":\"workspace\"}' >/dev/null
curl -s -X POST http://localhost:8565/api/v1/sessions/"'$session_id/story-brief -H '"'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{\"story_idea\":\"A child follows floating lanterns through a moonlit harbor and helps a shy otter guardian guide each light home before bed.\",\"origin\":\"workspace\"}' >/dev/null
pitch_json="'$(curl -s -X POST http://localhost:8565/api/v1/sessions/$session_id/pitches/generate -H '"'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{\"candidate_count\":3,\"origin\":\"workspace\"}')
pitch_id="'$(printf '"'%s' \""'$pitch_json" | jq -r '"'.snapshot.pitch_batches[0].pitches[0].id')
echo \"pitch_id="'$pitch_id"
curl -s -X POST http://localhost:8565/api/v1/sessions/$session_id/selections/pitch -H '"'Content-Type: application/json' -d \"{\\\"pitch_id\\\":\\\""'$pitch_id'"\\\",\\\"origin\\\":\\\"workspace\\\"}\" >/dev/null
character_json="'$(curl -s -X POST http://localhost:8565/api/v1/sessions/$session_id/characters/generate -H '"'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{\"candidate_count\":3,\"origin\":\"workspace\"}')
character_id="'$(printf '"'%s' \""'$character_json" | jq -r '"'.snapshot.character_sheet_batches[0].character_sheets[0].id')
echo \"character_id="'$character_id"
curl -s -X POST http://localhost:8565/api/v1/sessions/$session_id/selections/character-sheet -H '"'Content-Type: application/json' -d \"{\\\"character_sheet_id\\\":\\\""'$character_id'"\\\",\\\"origin\\\":\\\"workspace\\\"}\" >/dev/null
beat_json="'$(curl -s -X POST http://localhost:8565/api/v1/sessions/$session_id/beats/generate -H '"'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{\"guidance\":\"Keep the midpoint more awestruck than tense.\",\"focus_beats\":[\"midpoint\"],\"bedtime_goal\":\"Land in a visibly sleepy ending.\",\"origin\":\"workspace\"}')
beat_id="'$(printf '"'%s' \""'$beat_json" | jq -r '"'.snapshot.beat_sheet_revisions[0].id')
echo \"beat_id="'$beat_id"
echo "session_url=http://localhost:8566/sessions/$session_id?stage=beats"'
